package.name: genkit
package.subcategory: workflow orchestration with a provider-neutral model registry

module_constraints.commonjs_entry_obligation: Run a CommonJS sample that reaches lib/tracing/instrumentation.js.
module_constraints.esm_entry_obligation: Run a public ESM import sample; at 1.21.0 it also reaches lib/tracing/instrumentation.js.
module_constraints.esm_counterpart_note: lib/tracing/instrumentation.mjs exists and remains configured, but is not directly package-exported; do not claim direct Node reachability.
module_constraints.registration_requirement: The integration hook must call getHooks('@genkit-ai/core') (or include that name in the getHooks name array) and add every returned hook before genkit is loaded. Registering only getHooks('genkit') will not install the dependency-file rewrite hooks.
module_constraints.version_range_constraint: Only exactly 1.21.0 is proven. Do not claim a broader supported range without cross-version evidence.

requested_capture_fields: ctx.arguments length and overload-specific opts index
ctx.currentStore span identity and parent identity
runtime_context_mapping.note: These fields are capture requirements, not inferred context mappings.

required_cases: non-streaming generation success through a registered model action
streaming generation with every chunk consumed and the final response awaited
model runner rejection with captured input, empty normalized output, and error fields
tool-loop generation proving model -> tool -> model ordering
success_evidence: normalized input/output messages with model role represented as assistant
numeric input_tokens, output_tokens, and total_tokens when returned
model/provider values only when proven by the registered action name
no media URL, data/custom payload, raw provider response, or message metadata leakage

registration.name: opts.metadata.name
registration.model_provider: Only a proven registered-action-name prefix; otherwise undefined.
registration.model_name: Only a proven registered-action-name model component; otherwise undefined.

transform: Map Genkit role model to assistant.
Join only string part.text values into bounded message content.
Map toolRequest to toolCalls entries with name, arguments, toolId, and optional type.
Map toolResponse to toolResults entries with bounded string result, toolId, name, and optional type.
Drop media URLs, data parts, custom parts, raw provider values, and message metadata.

output.source: ctx.result.message, with parsed opts.metadata.output.message only as fallback
output.transform: Apply the same message normalization; use an empty normalized output message on error.

metrics.constraint: Tag only values that are numeric; do not invent or relabel other usage fields.

llmobs_contract.metadata: Explicit reviewed scalar generation-config allowlist only; exclude raw, custom, context, payloads, and secrets.

review_required_changes: Convert Genkit Part arrays into valid LLMObs message content strings.
Map role model to assistant.
Convert toolRequest parts to toolCalls and toolResponse parts to toolResults using the LLMObs tagger field names.
Never pass raw media URLs, data parts, custom payloads, provider raw responses, or message metadata through by default.
Tag only numeric usage fields; the three standard token metrics are required when present.
Derive provider and model only from a proven action-name convention and preserve undefined rather than inventing values.
Demote the Genkit model span to workflow when an enabled native provider LLMObs integration emits the authoritative llm span for the same request.
limitations: Input schema parsing happens before the selected hook and output schema parsing happens after it.
Native OpenTelemetry and provider integration duplicate-span behavior remains a runtime blocker.

required_cases: defined flow invocation with nested model, tool, retrieval, and embedding operations
named ai.run flow step with exact genkit:type=flowStep discriminator
flow runner rejection with workflow error fields
success_evidence: workflow input/output appears only in LLMObs capture, not ordinary APM payload tags
flow and flow-step spans have the expected child relationships

input.transform: Bounded LLMObs serialization subject to configured content capture and redaction.

output.source: ctx.result, with parsed opts.metadata.output only as fallback
output.transform: Bounded LLMObs serialization; empty output on error.

review_required_changes: Use genkit:type=flowStep as the exact flow-step discriminator.
Keep structured I/O in LLMObs only and rely on configured LLMObs content capture/redaction; do not add raw workflow I/O as ordinary APM tags.
Test flow to model/tool/retrieval/embedding parent-child relationships.
limitations: Input schema parsing happens before the selected hook and output schema parsing happens after it.

required_cases: model-selected tool invocation inside a generation loop
Genkit 1.21.0 tool interrupt fixture that records observed completion semantics without assuming error or success
success_evidence: bounded LLMObs tool input/output and no ordinary APM payload tags
tool span is parented between the requesting and follow-up model spans

input.transform: Bounded LLMObs serialization subject to configured content capture and redaction.

output.source: ctx.result, with parsed opts.metadata.output only as fallback
output.transform: Bounded string output; interrupt error/success semantics remain blocked on an exact-version fixture.

review_required_changes: Use bounded LLMObs text I/O and no raw ordinary APM payload tags.
Pin interrupt behavior with an exact 1.21.0 test before deciding whether an interrupt is an error or an interrupted successful result.
limitations: Input schema parsing happens before the selected hook and output schema parsing happens after it.

required_cases: retriever success returning at least one DocumentData value
success_evidence: query and result documents are tagger-valid text objects
only reviewed scalar name/id/score metadata is present
no raw DocumentData or arbitrary document metadata is captured

input.transform: Join only query.content part.text strings; never pass DocumentData directly.

output.transform: Convert each DocumentData content array to text and copy only explicitly reviewed scalar name/id/score.

review_required_changes: Flatten query.content text parts to the retrieval input value.
Convert each returned Genkit DocumentData from content parts to an LLMObs document object with a string text field.
Do not pass DocumentData objects directly to tagRetrievalIO because the tagger rejects objects without text.
Exclude arbitrary document metadata by default; copy only explicitly reviewed scalar name, id, or score fields.
limitations: Input schema parsing happens before the selected hook and output schema parsing happens after it.

required_cases: embedding success with multiple input documents and known vector dimension
success_evidence: input documents are tagger-valid text objects
output is a bounded count/dimension summary
no numeric vectors or arbitrary embedding/document metadata is captured

input.transform: Convert each DocumentData content array to text; never pass DocumentData directly.

output.transform: Emit [N embedding(s) returned with size D]; never serialize numeric vectors or embedding metadata.

review_required_changes: Convert each input DocumentData content array into an LLMObs document object with a string text field.
Do not pass Genkit DocumentData directly to tagEmbeddingIO because the tagger rejects objects without text.
Never serialize returned numeric vectors. Emit only a summary such as [N embedding(s) returned with size D].
Exclude arbitrary document and embedding metadata by default.
limitations: Input schema parsing happens before the selected hook and output schema parsing happens after it.

assertions: Every child trace_id equals its parent trace_id.
Every child parent_id equals the immediately enclosing expected span_id.
No duplicate authoritative llm span or duplicated token metrics exist for one provider request.
Native Genkit OpenTelemetry spans are counted and distinguished from Datadog integration spans.

streaming_obligations: Record chunk count and ordered bounded chunk summaries.
Consume the stream to completion and separately await the final response promise.
Prove the llm span finishes after final provider response/chunk production, not when generateStream returns its container.
Record stream error propagation and span error fields.
Do not claim that span duration includes delayed or abandoned consumer drain time.
error_obligations: Exercise runner/provider rejection for model, workflow, tool, retrieval, and embedding targets.
Capture error type, message, stack/error tags, span error flag, final output shape, and parent-child relationships.
Record that invalid input/output schema parsing occurs outside the selected hook rather than claiming coverage.
Exercise tool interrupt separately and preserve the observed result as unresolved until evidence establishes semantics.

rejected_operations.reason: Genkit 1.21.0 has no explicit agent lifecycle; tool-loop generation is not sufficient to label the operation as an agent.
They converge on model actions and would duplicate spans; stream container-return timing is not provider completion timing.
These are registration boundaries, not operation execution.
The requested LLMObs kinds do not establish semantics for these labels; a strict allowlist prevents noisy internal spans.

carried_findings.summary: Native Genkit message and document shapes are not valid direct inputs to the LLMObs tagger.
Raw embedding vectors must be summarized rather than serialized as LLMObs output.
The selected hook does not cover schema validation before or after runInNewSpan.
Native OpenTelemetry and provider LLMObs duplicate-span behavior is unresolved until real-app trace inspection.
The hidden shared hook is source-proven only at 1.21.0 and must not receive an unsupported broad version range.

carried_blockers: The curses TUI cannot run in this headless environment and is not marked passed.
Duplicate native OpenTelemetry/provider spans and token double counting require captured output from the real genkit@1.21.0 sample application.
Tool interrupt completion semantics require an executable 1.21.0 fixture.
The final supported semver range requires cross-version source and runtime evidence if it extends beyond 1.21.0.

completion_gate.pass_condition: All target cases execute against real genkit@1.21.0 and stored APM plus LLMObs output proves fields, nesting, streaming completion, errors, privacy, and no double counting.
